strengths: ~15 years of broad full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong craftsmanship signals: TDD, CI/CD, workshops, OSS founder of GISCollective
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML product leadership or recognized AI expertise required for the role
Title and scope (Senior/Staff IC) are below Director-level Principal Engineer expectations
No evidence of advising strategic customers/partners or driving org-wide AI strategy

key_factors.factor: AI strategy and recognized AI expertise
Breadth of engineering experience and craftsmanship

response.justification: The role demands a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, cloud/AI platform strategy chops, and a track record of advising strategic customers — the résumé shows a strong hands-on full-stack engineer with ~15 years of experience and recent MCP/agent tooling work at re:cinq, but no evidence of shipped AI products, platform-level AI leadership, customer advisory work, or Principal/Director-level scope. Cloud exposure is limited to AWS CDK at Optilyz, and there is no advanced AI degree or published thought leadership. Strengths in craftsmanship, OSS, and breadth do not offset the central AI-strategy and seniority gaps.
